formFields.settlementType: Level 2 Fortified Settlement / Camouflaged Woodland Town
formFields.demographics: Wood Elves, Elite Tactical Guardians, Devoted Brier Laborers
formFields.alignment: Neutral Good / Lawful Neutral faction lean
formFields.population: 1,000 Circadian Wardens + Full contingent of loyal Brier Farmers + 2 Livestock Units
formFields.tax_rate: 0% (Sustained by internal resources & hidden trade integration)
formFields.district_desc1: Subterranean cavern system housing core mining operations, clandestine heavy armor smithing, and contained underground forge networks.
formFields.district_desc2: Sea-cave and private dock facility utilizing a natural 'Null Zone' to obscure the Sovereign Wake. Timberlands tilled with iron-hard oaks stretch along the ridge.
formFields.district_desc3: Camouflaged turf-roof homesteads and stables situated alongside clear valley streams cultivating winter vegetables and fruit orchards.
formFields.district_notes: All sectors are heavily shrouded under active Sanctuary Protocol fields and structural foliage overrides to ensure a perfect zero detection baseline.
formFields.exports: Refined Shadow-Iron, Timber, Surplus Metalwares, and Grains
formFields.imports: Black-market smuggled goods, currency liquidity, advanced defensive schematics
formFields.factions: Sovereign Command, The Circadian Wardens, The Brier Loyalist Laborers, Sympathetic Black-Market Contacts, Imperial Fleet (Hostile External)
formFields.notable_npcs: Verneg (The Catalyst), Morgruth (Twin Souls Aspect / Ascended God)
formFields.quirks: Structures use living camouflage overlays; all telepathic communications pass through a sapphire mesh.
formFields.rumors: The Imperial Fleet is stepping up patrols around the Port of Bridfield looking for remnants of the old order.
formFields.history: Established as a hidden estate in the Bridfield Hinterlands following a massive exodus of refugees and guardians from the occupied Port of Bridfield under the cover of the Sanctuary Protocol.
